headline: Is Arch Capital Group (ACGL) Still Attractively Priced After Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether Arch Capital Group is still priced attractively after a strong multi year run, the next sections will walk through what the market is currently paying for the stock and why that matters for you. The share price closed at US$96.77 most recently, with returns of 3.3% over 30 days, 3.1% year to date, 4.6% over 1 year, 40.8% over 3 years and 157.7% over 5 years. Recent headlines around Arch Capital Group have focused on its position within the broader insurance...
